title: Hot Restart
description: Adds a button to restart the game with new mods loaded in. Also can autoload the world that was opened.
body:
Simple mod to restart Minecraft with a press of a button.
F1+R hotbind reloads the world.
Made for fast loading of newly added mods.
(Loads the previously opened world if pressed from world menu. Before loading the world displats a warning. Has a button switch to turn on/off the auto load.) works only on 1.20.1 Hot_reload_rejoin
